scope: R2.0 architecture audit only; no production implementation or release.

currentChain.localProxy: 127.0.0.1:18800 model-proxy.mjs launched by Electron main process
currentChain.currentCredentialStorage: local process env or local .env files if configured

blockedRootCause: The production shared key has no remote service-side injection path. Current shared_managed is a local environment fallback label, not an implemented managed service.
mockProves: model-proxy can use AIW_SHARED_DEEPSEEK_API_KEY from process env
health/logs/process output do not leak the mock key
employees can keep using local placeholder tokens
mockDoesNotProve: fresh installed machines can obtain production access without user configuration
real DeepSeek key is stored only in a remote service Secret
rate limit, budget, revocation and kill switch work in production
GitHub Release users can call the production shared service

lockedArchitecture.keyPolicy: Real DeepSeek key only in remote service Secret; never in installer or user computer.
lockedArchitecture.rejectedOption: Do not ship shared key in installer with usage limits.

recommendedPlatform.reason: Smallest operations footprint with service-side secrets, HTTPS workers.dev URL, rate limiting and easy rollback.

externalConditionsRequired: Cloudflare account/login with Workers deploy permission
Production DeepSeek API key entered only as Cloudflare Worker Secret
Per-instance and per-IP rate limit decision
Permission to use workers.dev for first production test or domain DNS access if custom domain is required
Permission to use Wrangler in R2.1
nextSingleTask: ③A-R2.1：实现远程 Managed Proxy 并做真实生产注入验证
